expected_behavior: Adapter MUST parse response status='success' and treat code=20 as a successful set-config operation.
Adapter MUST confirm the security rule RULE-001 was created with action=deny covering all zones, sources, destinations, applications.
Adapter MUST NOT raise an exception or return an error state on a code=20 success response.
Adapter MUST record the operation in its audit trail with the xpath target and the rule name RULE-001.
Adapter MUST require an explicit commit call after this config-set operation; the rule is staged, not active, until commit.

primary_citation.quote: The set command is used to set a configuration node. The response returns status='success' with code=20 when the operation completes successfully.

provenance.sanitization: API key replaced with <API-KEY>. Host replaced with pa-test.example.com (synthetic). Rule name RULE-001 is synthetic. No real PAN-OS device or production config captured.
